DebugMode.Name: Debug Mode
DebugMode.Hint: Enable verbose logging to the browser console for troubleshooting.

SkipDuplicates.Name: Skip Duplicate Entries
SkipDuplicates.Hint: When importing, skip entries whose name already exists in the target compendium pack.

DefaultPublisher.Name: Default Publisher
DefaultPublisher.Hint: Default publisher name pre-filled in the Import Wizard metadata form.

OcrEnabled.Name: Enable OCR for Image-Based PDFs
OcrEnabled.Hint: When enabled, pages with insufficient embedded text will be processed through Tesseract OCR (loaded from CDN on first use).

AiProvider.Name: AI Provider
AiProvider.Hint: AI provider used for content extraction refinement. Requires an API key.

AiBaseUrl.Name: AI Base URL
AiBaseUrl.Hint: Base URL for the OpenAI-compatible API endpoint (e.g. https://api.openai.com or https://openrouter.ai/api).

AiModel.Name: AI Model
AiModel.Hint: Model name to use for extraction (e.g. gpt-4o-mini, gpt-4o, claude-3-haiku).

AiApiKey.Name: AI API Key
AiApiKey.Hint: Your API key for the selected AI provider. Stored in world settings (GM-only). Leave blank to disable AI extraction.

ImportWizard.Title: Import Wizard
ImportWizard.OverwriteLabel: Overwrite records with the same name if they already exist
ImportWizard.GlobalMetadataHint: Applied to all records that don't include their own

ContentBrowser.Title: Content Browser
ContentBrowser.Search: Search by name, publisher, source book, tags…
ContentBrowser.NoContentHint: Use the Import Wizard to import your first records.
ContentBrowser.NoMatchFilters: No records match the current filters.

ConversionReport.Title: Conversion Report
ConversionReport.NoResults: No records match the current filter.

Errors.NoAdapter: No adapter registered for the current game system.
Errors.PackNotFound: Compendium pack not found. Ensure the module is active and the pack exists.
Errors.ImportFailed: Import failed. See the Import Report for details.
Errors.NotGM: Only the Game Master can import content.
Errors.DatabaseNotReady: Content database is not initialized. Try again after the world finishes loading.
Errors.SaveFailed: Failed to save records to the database.
Errors.DeleteFailed: Failed to delete record from the database.
Errors.NoConverterForCategory: No converter is registered for category "{category}".
Errors.CompendiumWriteFailed: Failed to write document to compendium: {message}
Errors.NothingToConvert: No records to convert. Import content first.

Notifications.ValidationWarning: {count} entries failed validation and will be skipped.
Notifications.ParseWarning: Parsing completed with {count} error(s). Review before continuing.
Notifications.NoParsedRecords: No records were parsed from the input. Check the format.
Notifications.ConversionComplete: Conversion complete: {imported} imported, {updated} updated, {skipped} skipped, {failed} failed.
Notifications.NoRecordsSelected: No records selected. Use the checkboxes to select records first.

Validation.INVALID_CATEGORY: Category "{value}" is not a recognized content category.
Validation.DUPLICATE_NAME: A record named "{name}" already exists in the database.
Validation.WILL_OVERWRITE: A record named "{name}" already exists and will be overwritten.
Validation.MISSING_PAGE_NUMBER: Page Number is missing or zero.
Validation.EMPTY_RAW_CONTENT: No field data was found in this record beyond name and category.

SchemaManager.Title: Schema Manager
SchemaManager.NoSchemasHint: Click Scan Current System to discover document schemas from the installed Starfinder system.
SchemaManager.NoDiffs: No schema changes detected since the last session.
SchemaManager.NoProfilesHint: Run a schema scan to auto-generate profiles.
SchemaManager.RepairNoneRun: No repair has been run yet.
SchemaManager.RepairNoneRunHint: Click Repair All Records to automatically fill missing fields using schema defaults and registered templates.
SchemaManager.ScanComplete: Schema scan complete. {schemas} schema(s) found, {changes} change(s) detected.
SchemaManager.ScanFailed: Schema scan failed. See console for details.
SchemaManager.RebuildFailed: Rebuild failed. See console for details.
SchemaManager.RepairFailed: Repair failed. See console for details.
SchemaManager.NoRecordsToRepair: No records in the database to repair.
SchemaManager.ConfirmRebuildContent: This will clear the cached schema data and run a full rescan. Mapping profiles will be regenerated. Continue?
SchemaManager.SchemaChangesDetected: {count} schema change(s) detected since last session. Open Schema Manager → Diffs tab for details.

TemplateManager.Title: Template Manager
TemplateManager.BtnRefresh: Re-snapshot system data from the live document
TemplateManager.NoTemplatesHint: Click Add Template and provide a document UUID to get started.
TemplateManager.AddTemplateUuidHint: Right-click any Item or Actor in Foundry and choose Copy UUID to get its UUID.
TemplateManager.InvalidDocumentType: The selected document has no type property. Items and Actors are supported.
TemplateManager.DocumentGone: Document no longer exists at UUID: {uuid}
TemplateManager.SchemaLearnFailed: Could not discover schema from template "{name}".
TemplateManager.AddFailed: Failed to add template. See console for details.
TemplateManager.LearnFailed: Failed to learn schema from template.
TemplateManager.ConfirmClearContent: Remove all registered templates? This cannot be undone.

Repair.NoSchemaMapping: No schema mapping for category: "{category}". Cannot repair.
Repair.NoSchemaDiscovered: No discovered schema for {docType}.{subtype}. Open Schema Manager and run Scan first.

PdfImport.Title: PDF Import Wizard
PdfImport.DropZoneHint: Drop PDF files here or browse
PdfImport.QueueEmpty: No files in queue. Drop PDF files above to get started.
PdfImport.ProcessingError: PDF processing encountered an error. See console for details.

ExtractionReview.Title: Extraction Review
ExtractionReview.NoRecords: No records match the current filter.
ExtractionReview.SaveFailed: Database save failed. See console for details.
ExtractionReview.NoAccepted: No records are marked as accepted.
